title: (Deprecated) Preview video templates
content:
Use this endpoint to preview video templates. An iframe code snippet with a link will be returned in the response. You can either click the link or embed the iframe code snippet in an HTML file. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/catalog/template_preview/create/| /v1.3/catalog/template_preview/create/| |Request parameter data type |`bc_id`: number
`catalog_ids`: number[]|`bc_id`: string
`catalog_ids`: string[]| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type. Allowed format: `"application/json"` | ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {required}|string| Business Center ID. | |catalog_ids {required}|string[]| Catalog IDs. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code cURL cURL) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/catalog/template_preview/create/' \ --header 'Access-Token: xxxx \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data-raw '{ "bc_id": "6725320885500118022", "catalog_ids": ["6986901069595002626"] }' (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data|object|Returned data.| #|iframe|string| An iframe code snippet that includes the preview link. Click the link to preview the video or embed the iframe code to your HTML file.| |request_id|string| The log id of a request, which uniquely identifies the request.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code JSON JSON) { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "20210810121217010245016027560AC221", "data": { "iframe": "" } } (/code) ```
